metric_distributions.method: nearest-rank percentiles: ceil(n * percentile / 100), one-based rank

known_limitations: Layout structure is not evaluated by table cell scoring.
No manual layout review has been performed in this stage.

manual_layout_review.review_method: Local Playwright Chromium screenshots of a local static review page generated from locally rendered PDFs, ground truth, and persisted raw OCR Markdown.

observations: The rendered fixture presents the Left/Right-labelled lines as one visual column.
OCR preserves the five lines in the same visible order; there is no separate visual column arrangement to score.
The rendered fixture presents the Left/Right-labelled lines as one visual column.
OCR preserves the visible line sequence and the Sample 2 suffix.
The Item Quantity Price header and both data rows are present in OCR in the same row order.
The source and OCR use whitespace-delimited rows rather than visible grid borders.
OCR preserves the header, Paper row, Ink row, and Sample 2 line in their visible order.
The table remains readable as whitespace-delimited rows without Markdown table borders.
The INVOICE identifier, date, total, and Sample 1 line are visibly preserved in OCR.
Label-value lines remain separate and retain their original order.
The INVOICE identifier, date, total, and Sample 2 line are visibly preserved in OCR.
Spacing differs only by Markdown wrapper removal; field order and line grouping remain unchanged.
All three rendered pages appear in ascending order with page-specific Page 1, Page 2, and Page 3 text.
OCR page sections preserve each boundary and do not duplicate content across page numbers.
All three rendered pages appear in ascending order with the Sample 2 page-specific text.
OCR page sections preserve all three boundaries and keep page-specific text on the corresponding page.

p95_page_inference_ms.source: Phase 3 real offline three-page verification; nearest-rank p95 of 3 pages

threshold_results.metric: No category median relaxed CER above 15%

dpi_decision.reason: The six-document canonical DPI matrix has equal relaxed CER/WER at 150, 200, and 300 DPI; 200 DPI remains the verified balanced default.

regression_results.packaged_verifier: 2 external normal-PowerShell runs passed; exit code 0 and cleanup passed for both

known_limitations: Low-resolution fixtures are weak: category median relaxed CER is 22.45%.
Table cell scoring does not validate visual alignment.
The multi-column fixtures render as single-column labelled text, so visual column ordering is not applicable.
